title: APM: Browser Fingerprinting via Canvas/WebGL/AudioContext
description: Detects browser fingerprinting techniques using Canvas API, WebGL parameters, AudioContext, and other APIs commonly used to uniquely identify browsers. Excessive fingerprinting API calls indicate tracking scripts or reconnaissance.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and (( (('Span Attributes' like '*canvas.toDataURL*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*toBlob*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*getImageData*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*webgl.getParameter*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*WEBGL_debug_renderer_info*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*getExtension*')) ) or ( (('Span Attributes' like '*AudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*OfflineAudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*createOscillator*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*navigator.plugins*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*navigator.languages*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*screen.colorDepth*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*navigator.hardwareConcurrency*')) ) or ( (('Span Attributes' like '*canvas.toDataURL*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*toBlob*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*getImageData*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*AudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*OfflineAudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*createOscillator*')) )) | stats count as FingerprintAttempts by 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'Service Name' | sort -FingerprintAttempts
